GG0130C2_TOILTG_HYGN_GOAL_CD GG0130C2 Self Care: Toileting Hygiene Goal by Discharge Indicates the patient's goal to perform toileting hygiene tasks by discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or following the activity.
04. Supervision or touching assistance – Helper provides
